name: Lost You Forever
overview: In ancient times, humans, gods, and demons lived together, and the three kingdoms of Shennong, Xuanyuan, and Gaoxin stood together. Jiuyao (Xiaoyao) has gone through a hundred years of suffering, losing not only her identity but also her appearance. She settles down in Qingshui Town, becoming Wen Xiaoliu.

trailers.title: Trailer | Everyone struggles with uncontrollable feelings that make them in deep greif | 长相思 第一季
